name: Marinaded Deer Roast
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Salt pork, cut in strips
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------MARINADE-------------------------
4 cups Vinegar
4 cups Water
1 tablespoon Salt
1 tablespoon Red pepper
1 tablespoon Pepper (black)
3 minced Garlic cloves
3 Bay leaves
1 teaspoon Cloves
1 teaspoon Allspice
1 teaspoon Thyme
Mix all ingredients with the brandy into the marinade. Pour over the roast and soak for at least 6-8 hours, turning several times.
Before roasting, punch several holes in the roast with a sharp knife. Insert the salt pork with additional garlic.
Cook at 325-350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20-25 minutes per pound. Baste frequently with drippings and marinade.
When tender, remove the meat and keep warm while making gravy.
GRAVY: In the roasting pan, slowly melt 1 cup currant jelly with the drippings and marinade. Add a mixture of flour mixed with water to thicken. When the desired consistency is reached, add 1 tablespoon brandy, stir well, and serve.
Suggestions: Use muscadine jelly for better tasting gravy.
